summary: Tested PDF generation feature with jspdf + jspdf-autotable. Found and FIXED critical bug: doc.autoTable is not a function (jspdf-autotable v5.x requires applyPlugin). All PDF features now working correctly.
passed_tests: Cash-Flow tab shows 'Générer e-CMR PDF' button (blue, not disabled) - PASS
Each invoice row has a 'PDF' button in the actions column - PASS (3 buttons found)
Click 'Générer e-CMR PDF' - shows 'Aucune facture en attente à générer' (correct - all invoices are paid) - PASS
Click individual 'PDF' button - shows success toast 'PDF INV-20260402-9B62EA téléchargé' - PASS
Vue d'ensemble 'Générer e-CMR' quick action button triggers PDF generation - PASS
No 'bientôt disponible' toast appears anywhere - PASS
Subscription gating: Switch to SOLO/DUO plan - PDF button locked with opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed - PASS
Subscription gating: Clicking locked button shows 'Génération PDF disponible dans le pack Croissance' - PASS
pdfGenerator.js creates valid jsPDF document (no JS errors after fix) - PASS

bugs_fixed.root_cause: jspdf-autotable v5.x changed API - plugin no longer auto-attaches to jsPDF
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed import from 'import jspdf-autotable' to 'import { applyPlugin } from jspdf-autotable' and added applyPlugin(jsPDF)

critical_code_review_comments: pdfGenerator.js now correctly imports and applies jspdf-autotable v5.x plugin
generateInvoicePDF() creates professional Factur-X PDF with logo, invoice details, table, PAYÉ stamp for paid invoices
generateAllInvoicesPDF() correctly filters unpaid invoices only
Subscription gating works correctly - SOLO/DUO plan locks PDF generation feature
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF generation feature fully working. Fixed jspdf-autotable v5.x import issue. Key test-ids: generate-pdf-btn, pdf-{invoice_id}, gated-pdfGeneration, nav-cashflow. All invoices in DB are 'paid' status, so bulk PDF generation shows 'Aucune facture en attente à générer' (correct behavior). Individual PDF buttons work for any invoice. Subscription gating verified - SOLO/DUO plan locks PDF feature with proper restriction message.

bulk_button.behavior: Generates PDFs for unpaid invoices only. Shows 'Aucune facture en attente à générer' if all paid.

individual_buttons.behavior: Generates PDF for any invoice. Shows 'PDF {invoice_id} téléchargé' toast.

quick_action.behavior: Same as bulk button. Locked for SOLO/DUO plan.
